judgment.summary: MongoDB shows strong revenue growth and healthy cash reserves but faces challenges with negative profitability and high valuation multiples.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS 1.65 vs estimate 1.47 (12.1% beat); next earnings date 2026-05-28.
positives: Free cash flow (TTM) $463.32M — provides significant liquidity.
Total cash $2.39B vs total debt $62.83M — strong liquidity position.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% — company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E 42.88x — high valuation relative to earnings.
Quarterly earnings growth -1.9% — recent deceleration in earnings.

news.paragraph: MongoDB is experiencing positive analyst sentiment, highlighted by Citi raising its target price and placing the stock on a positive catalyst watch. While a lack of near-term estimate upside has provided some pressure, the company's AI push and international expansion are driving a bullish intermediate-term outlook from some research firms.
headlines: MongoDB AI Push And Ireland Expansion Shape Investor Expectations
MongoDB's Modest Upside Good Enough to Support Stock, Oppenheimer Says
Technical Assessment: Bullish in the Intermediate-Term
MongoDB rises as Citi opens positive catalyst watch on stock, lifts target price
Lack Of Near-Term Estimate Upside Pressured MongoDB (MDB) in Q1
Artificial Intelligence Platform Quietly Transforming PLTR's Business
